steps.title: Spot the positive clue
steps.content: The presenter said her inspiration came from Elease Southerland’s work in Let the Lion Eat Straw, which she notes was among her favorite books as a child. That tells us she felt favorably toward the author’s work.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A, “an affinity for,” expresses a liking or positive attraction, which fits the clue that the work was a beloved childhood favorite.
The other three either suggest a requirement, mixed feelings, or mere satisfaction—none convey the positive inspiration described.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
